name: Surfer SEO
description:
How does Surfer SEO help agencies?

Surfer SEO helps you find clients easily. With insights on monthly search volume, search intent and keyword difficulty. Along with that, it’s AI-capabilities helps you generate articles at a scale, for error-free SEO and to get to know about what’s working and what’s not working and how one can constantly keep ranking on SERPs. 

Source: G2

Features: 

  • Helps you get insights on monthly search volume, search intent, and keyword difficulty in detail
  • It helps you with recommendations that are based on real-time analysis. 
  • One can either generate an article in under 20 minutes or upload it manually, and then run it for SEO errors, keywords, and much more. 
  • With Surfer AI, one can do the research and write an article along with optimizing it in multiple languages and different niches.

Pros 

  • Helps you drive organic traffic irrespective of the industry you belong to
  • Has an easy-to-use interface
  • Comes at an affordable price 

Cons

  • The Surfer AI article generator might get the work done faster, however, it's not up to the mark, and customers complain that most of it looks AI-generated, which is not very appealing to publish.
  • Content editor and auditor feature credits cannot be rolled over to the next month, along with a new billing cycle which makes it inconvenient for a lot of users. 

Pricing

Starts at $89 Per Month
